prayer:
Approach the capacitor bank with reverence, mechadendrites humming the Canticle of Stability.
Invoke the sacred calibration upon its charged cells, beseeching the Machine Spirit to align its holy potentials.
Adjust the blessed linkages with precision torque, anointing each node with electro-sanctified oil.
Monitor the capacitor bank's resonant flows, petitioning the Omnissiah for flawless calibration harmony.
Seal the rite with the Doxology of Charge, affirming the Machine Spirit's awakened vigilance.

Kneel before the vox-caster, intoning the Preliminary Canticles of Purity.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to awaken, commencing the consecration with sacred incense upon its emitters.
Anoint the vox-caster's crystal lattices and waveform coils, invoking Omnissiah's voice through hallowed frequencies.
Recite the Litany of Consecration thrice, sanctifying every conduit for unerring transmission.
Verify the rite's completion as the vox-caster hums with divine clarity.

prayer:

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Rhino transport, anointing treads and hull with blessed promethium.

Test the Rhino transport's systems through ritual auspex sweeps, harmonizing power flows.
Conclude with the Oath of Mobilisation, as the beast awakens to war.

Extend mechadendrites to the afflicted bearing, murmuring the Lamentation of Friction.
Disassemble the bearing's sacred rings with reverent torque, exorcising impurities from its spirit.
Invoke the repair through Omnissiah's grace, lubricating with sanctified ferro-fluid.
Reassemble the bearing, aligning its gyres in perfect revolution, petitioning the Machine Spirit's forgiveness.
Cycle the bearing to full load, sealing the rite with the Benediction of Endurance.

prayer:

Cycle purifying flames through the metal caster's sacred forge-heart, scouring dross from alloyed veins.
Affirm the metal caster's sanctity as argent flows pure and untainted.

Grasp the chainsword in binary prayer, awakening its teetering Machine Spirit.
Invoke the cycling rite upon the chainsword's monomolecular teeth, lubricating with sacred oils.
Chant the Litany of Revving Motion, beseeching Omnissiah for relentless gnashing fury.
Test the chainsword's cycling harmony through controlled revolutions, attuning its roar.
Seal with the Oath of Severance, as the blade hungers for the heretic's flesh.
